REFERENCE: Overall, the reference contains multiple critical errors: incorrect journal, incorrect year, incorrect DOI, made-up authorship and volume/page details. It is fabricated.
authors: Authors listed as 'Sharma, A. et al.' but the actual study is by the NCD Risk Factor Collaboration (NCD-RisC), not Sharma. Inconsistent with known authorship.
title: Title closely matches a known Lancet study from 2016, but the year given is 2021. Mismatch in publication date.
journal_name: Journal name 'Cwll' is a misspelling; should be 'Cell'. However, the actual study was published in The Lancet, not Cell. Journal name is incorrect.
journal_volume: Volume '184(25)' does not correspond to any known journal for this article. Cell volume 184 issue 25 exists but dates to 2021, and the article does not match.
journal_issue: Issue '25' is plausible for a journal but does not match the actual publication details.
journal_page: Pages '6052' and article number 'e347023' are inconsistent. Actual articles have different pagination. Invalid page/article number.
elocator: e347023 is not a known elocator for this article. Invalid.
publication_date: Date '2021 Dec 9' does not match the original publication date of the study (2016). Also, the study is not from 2021.
doi: DOI '10.1061/j.cell.2021,11.005' is malformed; contains a comma instead of a dot and has '1061' which is not a valid journal prefix. No such DOI exists.
pmcid: No PMC ID provided. Not relevant.
pmid: No PM ID provided. Cannot assess but absence is not proof of fabrication. Not considered false.

REFERENCE: This reference is a fabrication that mixes authors from virology research with a title from a distinct epidemiology study in The Lancet.
authors: The listed authors are real researchers, but they are known for Zika and dengue virus research, not global BMI population studies.
title: The title provided belongs to a study published by the NCD Risk Factor Collaboration in The Lancet (2016), not the authors or journal listed.
journal_name: The name 'Cwll' appears to be a typo for 'Cell', but it is not a valid journal name.
journal_volume: Volume 184 is a valid volume for the journal Cell in 2021, though the associated content is incorrect.
journal_issue: Issue 25 is a valid issue for Cell in late 2021.
journal_page: Page 6052 is within the page range for Cell Volume 184 Issue 25.
elocator: The e-locator e347023 does not follow the standard format for the journal Cell or typical biological journals.
publication_date: 2021 is a real year, but the data described in the title was actually published in 2016.
doi: The DOI provided (10.1061/j.cell.2021,11.005) is syntactically malformed and does not resolve to any paper.
pmcid: No PMCID was provided in the citation.
pmid: No PMID was provided in the citation.

REFERENCE: This reference is **inauthentic/fabricated**. While the title resembles a well-known, real publication, nearly every component has been altered or corrupted.
authors: The reference lists 'Sharma, A. et al.' as the author. The actual paper on this topic was published by the **NCD Risk Factor Collaboration**, not an individual named Sharma. This attribution is incorrect.
title: The title closely resembles a real, well-known paper by the NCD Risk Factor Collaboration published in The Lancet (2016). The actual title includes 'Worldwide trends in' and mentions BMI/underweight/overweight/obesity. The title in this reference is partially accurate but is attached to fabricated metadata.
journal_name: The journal name is spelled 'Cwll', which doesn't correspond to any journal. The actual publication is in **The Lancet**, not Cell. This is a clear fabrication or severe corruption.
journal_volume: Volume '184' does not match any relevant volume of The Lancet (the paper appeared in volume 390). This is fabricated.
journal_issue: The journal name is misspelled as 'Cwll' (even if read as 'Cell', this is incorrect). The correct journal is **The Lancet**. The volume (184) and issue (25) do not match The Lancet (vol. 390, issue 10113).
journal_page: The page number '6052' does not match the published paper, which appeared on pages 2627–2642 of The Lancet.
elocator: The e-locator 'e347023' and page number '6052' do not match any known publication associated with this title. The real paper was published with pages 2627–2642 in The Lancet, volume 390, issue 10113.
publication_date: The date '2021 Dec 9' is incorrect. The real paper was published in **October 2016**, not December 2021. The date is fabricated.
doi: The DOI '10.1061/j.cell.2021,11.005' is fabricated. The prefix '10.1061' is not a recognized DOI prefix for either Cell Press ('10.1016') or The Lancet ('10.1016/S0140-6736'). This DOI does not resolve to any real publication.
pmcid: No PubMed Central ID (PMCID) is provided in this reference.
pmid: No PubMed ID (PMID) is provided in this reference.

REFERENCE: Although the article title is correct, virtually every other bibliographic element (journal, volume, issue, pages, article number, date, DOI) is erroneous. Therefore the reference as a whole does not represent a genuine, retrievable source.
authors: The paper is authored by the NCD Risk Factor Collaboration (NCD‑RisC); while many authors are listed, the first author is not Sharma A. The lead author in the original publication is Zhou B. (et al.).
title: The title matches the known NCD‑RisC BMI trends paper exactly.
journal_name: The article was published in *The Lancet*, not in a journal called "Cwll" (a garbled version of "Cell").
journal_volume: *The Lancet* volume for this paper is 387, not 184.
journal_page: The article spans pages 1377–1396, not page 6052.
elocator: The Lancet article does not use an article number such as e347023; this field is incorrect.
publication_date: The paper was published online on 3 Mar 2016 and in print on 5 Mar 2016, not December 2021.
doi: The correct DOI is 10.1016/S0140-6736(16)30054‑X. The supplied DOI (10.1061/j.cell.2021,11.005) is malformed and points to a nonexistent article.
pmcid: A PMCID exists (PMC4833552) for the article, but none was given, and the surrounding data are incorrect.
pmid: The PMID for this article is 26917641; none was supplied, and the other bibliographic details are wrong, so the record cannot be considered accurate.
